mapper.sql: id, waybill_no, scan_time, weight, province, destination, salesman_name, send_customer, send_customer_name, settle_code, settle_name, material_type, extra_fee, express_fee, bill_month, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_waybill_detail ( waybill_no, scan_time, weight, province, destination, salesman_name, send_customer, send_customer_name, settle_code, settle_name, material_type, extra_fee, express_fee, bill_month ) VALUES
(#{item.waybillNo}, #{item.scanTime}, #{item.weight}, #{item.province}, #{item.destination}, #{item.salesmanName}, #{item.sendCustomer}, #{item.sendCustomerName}, #{item.settleCode}, #{item.settleName}, #{item.materialType}, #{item.extraFee}, #{item.expressFee}, #{item.billMonth})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_waybill_detail SET extra_fee = 0.1 WHERE province = '上海市' OR destination LIKE CONCAT('%', '太仓市', '%') OR destination LIKE CONCAT('%', '昆山市', '%')
mapper.select: SELECT settle_name AS shopName, send_customer_name AS customerName FROM t_waybill_detail WHERE material_type NOT IN ('圆通新电子面单','COD电子面单') GROUP BY settle_name, send_customer_name ORDER BY send_customer_name, settle_name
mapper.update: update t_waybill_detail set send_customer_name = #{customerName} where settle_name = #{shopName}
mapper.select: SELECT send_customer AS customerCode, send_customer_name AS customerName FROM t_waybill_detail WHERE material_type NOT IN ('圆通新电子面单','COD电子面单') GROUP BY send_customer, send_customer_name ORDER BY send_customer_name, send_customer
mapper.update: UPDATE t_waybill_detail SET send_customer = #{code} WHERE send_customer_name = #{name}
UPDATE t_waybill_detail SET emp_type = #{empType},salesman_name = #{empName} WHERE send_customer_name = #{custName}
UPDATE t_waybill_detail SET emp_type = '散件' WHERE send_customer_name is null
mapper.select: SELECT send_customer, send_customer_name FROM t_waybill_detail WHERE emp_type IS NULL GROUP BY send_customer, send_customer_name

update.foreach: update t_waybill_detail set express_fee = #{data.fee} where code = #{data.billId}

mapper.select: SELECT t1.waybill_no AS id, t1.scan_time AS scanDate, t1.weight AS weight, t1.province AS province, t1.destination AS destination, t1.salesman_name AS employeeName, t1.send_customer AS code, t1.send_customer_name AS name, t1.settle_code AS shopId, t1.settle_name AS shopName, t1.material_type AS shopType, t1.extra_fee AS officeExtra, t1.express_fee AS expense FROM t_waybill_detail t1 WHERE (t1.emp_type = '散件' AND t1.salesman_name IN (SELECT real_name FROM t_contract_staff where staff_type = 0)) OR t1.emp_type = '淘宝'

SELECT t1.waybill_no AS id, t1.scan_time AS scanDate, t1.weight AS weight, t1.province AS province, t1.destination AS destination, t1.salesman_name AS employeeName, t1.send_customer AS code, t1.send_customer_name AS name, t1.settle_code AS shopId, t1.settle_name AS shopName, t1.material_type AS shopType, t1.extra_fee AS officeExtra, t1.express_fee AS expense FROM t_waybill_detail t1 WHERE t1.emp_type = '限定'

SELECT t1.waybill_no AS id, t1.scan_time AS scanDate, t1.weight AS weight, t1.province AS province, t1.destination AS destination, t1.salesman_name AS employeeName, t1.send_customer AS code, t1.send_customer_name AS name, t1.settle_code AS shopId, t1.settle_name AS shopName, t1.material_type AS shopType, t1.extra_fee AS officeExtra, t1.express_fee AS expense FROM t_waybill_detail t1 WHERE t1.emp_type = '特批'

SELECT t1.waybill_no AS id, t1.scan_time AS scanDate, t1.weight AS weight, t1.province AS province, t1.destination AS destination, t1.salesman_name AS employeeName, 'COMPANY_EMP' AS code, t1.send_customer_name AS name, t1.settle_code AS shopId, t1.settle_name AS shopName, t1.material_type AS shopType, t1.extra_fee AS officeExtra, t1.express_fee AS expense FROM t_waybill_detail t1 WHERE t1.emp_type = '散件' AND t1.salesman_name IN (SELECT real_name FROM t_contract_staff where staff_type = 1)
